title: epipactis helleborine subsp. papillosa
intro: Epipactis helleborine subsp. papillosa, also known as the hairy helleborine, is a subspecies of the Epipactis helleborine orchid. It is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the orchid family. Traditionally, Epipactis helleborine subsp. papillosa has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and soothing digestive problems, and it can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures.
